description: Tracked V1 scheduler evaluation scenario expectations. Quality and performance metrics are report-only until thresholds stabilize.

scenarios.expected: fresh canonical seed is fully feasible; late jobs may wait for future arrivals but must not expose shortage-resolution rows
scenarios.blocking: hard correctness gates plus no material-shortage aggregate rows

scenarios.expected: at least one infeasible job with material shortage evidence and aggregate material recommendations
jobs with material arriving later are scheduled after arrival instead of falsely marked infeasible
parent child-product shortage traces to raw-material evidence
zero material infeasible jobs and zero material aggregate rows
late/resource pressure is reported as quality impact, not material shortage
after applying recommended material rows and rerunning, no material infeasible jobs remain and all feasible jobs have slots
